title: 2026 Oscar Predictions: Best Director
text: The 98th Academy Awards ceremony will air March 15, 2026, on ABC with Conan O'Brien hosting. The Best Director category features predictions based on combined forecasts from industry experts, Gold Derby editors, top-performing users, and the broader prediction community. Top Contenders: 1. Paul Thomas Anderson – "One Battle After Another" (Warner Bros.) - Current odds: 93.86%, 2. Ryan Coogler – "Sinners" (Warner Bros.) - Current odds: 4.54%, 3. Chloé Zhao – "Hamnet" (Focus Features) - Current odds: 0.94%, 4. Joachim Trier – "Sentimental Value" (Neon) - Current odds: 0.35%, 5. Josh Safdie – "Marty Supreme" (A24) - Current odds: 0.29%
